name: anthropic
context: Anthropic Claude API ecosystem — messages, tool use, streaming, prompt caching, batch processing, and agent SDK
info: The Anthropic ecosystem covers the Claude API platform: sending messages with text and image content, streaming responses via SSE, connecting Claude to external tools, caching prompt prefixes for cost and latency savings, processing large volumes asynchronously via the Batch API, and building autonomous agents with the Agent SDK. The primary SDKs are anthropic (Python) and @anthropic-ai/sdk (TypeScript). Authentication uses API keys via the x-api-key header or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable. All endpoints live under https://api.anthropic.com/v1/. Rate limits are tiered by organization spend level and measured in RPM, ITPM, and OTPM per model class.
body:
# Anthropic Ecosystem

Anthropic builds the Claude family of large language models. The Claude API is the primary programmatic interface — agents send messages, receive structured responses, invoke tools, stream output in real time, and orchestrate multi-step workflows.

## API Endpoint

All requests target `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/`. Every request must include:

- `x-api-key` header (or set `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` env var in the SDK)
- `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01` header
- `content-type: application/json`

## Core Capabilities

- **[[anthropic/messages]]** — Send conversational messages and receive structured responses. The fundamental building block.
- **[[anthropic/messages/stream]]** — Stream responses token-by-token via server-sent events for real-time UX.
- **[[anthropic/messages/create]]** — Create a single message completion with full parameter control.
- **[[anthropic/tool-use]]** — Connect Claude to external functions. Claude decides when to call tools and returns structured input for your code to execute.
- **[[anthropic/prompt-caching]]** — Cache prompt prefixes to cut latency and cost on repeated context (system prompts, documents, tool definitions).
- **[[anthropic/batch]]** — Process thousands of requests asynchronously at 50% discount. Results within 24 hours.
- **[[anthropic/agent-sdk]]** — Build autonomous agents that understand codebases, edit files, and run commands.

## Reference

- **[[anthropic/models]]** — Available models, context windows, pricing, and capabilities.
- **[[anthropic/auth]]** — API key management, SDK configuration, and security best practices.
- **[[anthropic/rate-limits]]** — Tiered rate limits (RPM, ITPM, OTPM), headers, and optimization strategies.
- **[[anthropic/pricing]]** — Per-model token pricing, caching discounts, batch discounts, and tool-specific costs.

## SDKs

| SDK | Package | Language | Install |
|-----|---------|----------|---------|
| Python | `anthropic` | Python 3.9+ | `pip install anthropic` |
| TypeScript | `@anthropic-ai/sdk` | Node 18+ | `npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk` |
| Agent SDK | `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` | Node 18+ | `npm install @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` |

## Quick Start

```python
import anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic()  # reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env

message = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello, Claude"}]
)
print(message.content[0].text)
```

```typescript
import Anthropic from "@anthropic-ai/sdk";

const client = new Anthropic(); // reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env

const message = await client.messages.create({
  model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  max_tokens: 1024,
  messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Hello, Claude" }]
});
console.log(message.content[0].text);
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Purpose |
|----------|----------|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | API key for authentication (required) |
| `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` | Override API base URL (optional, for proxies) |
| `ANTHROPIC_LOG` | Set to `debug` for request/response logging |

sections.title: API overview
sections.body: The Claude API uses a conversational messages format. Send an array of user/assistant message turns and receive the next assistant response. The API supports text, images, documents, tool calls, and structured output. All requests go to `POST /v1/messages`. Streaming uses the same endpoint with `stream: true`. See [[anthropic/messages]] for full parameter reference.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.body: Every API request requires an API key passed via the `x-api-key` header. SDKs read from the `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` environment variable by default. Keys are created in the Anthropic Console under Settings > API Keys. Keys can be scoped to specific workspaces. See [[anthropic/auth]] for details on key management and security.

sections.title: Model selection
sections.body: Current flagship models: Claude Opus 4.6 (`claude-opus-4-6`) for maximum intelligence, Claude Sonnet 4.6 (`claude-sonnet-4-6`) for speed/intelligence balance, and Claude Haiku 4.5 (`claude-haiku-4-5`) for fastest responses. All support 200K+ context windows, vision, tool use, and extended thinking. See [[anthropic/models]] for full comparison.
